narrative:
Westerville 4-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,761 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.2 percentage points.
